title: sterculia urens
intro: Sterculia urens, a plant species native to Southeast Asia, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the mallow family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sterculia urens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and grinding the leaves or bark, which can be consumed as a tea or used in the form of a powder or capsule.
